member.name: T:YLproxy.Core.Config.ProxyDataService
member.summary: JSON-based proxy data persistence service. Single data source: data/config.json with atomic writes and rotating backups.

member.name: P:YLproxy.Core.Config.ProxyDataService.CredentialsResetDuringLoad
member.summary: Indicates whether credentials were reset during the most recent load operation.

member.name: F:YLproxy.Core.MonitorService._restartBackoff
member.summary: Tracks consecutive restart failures per proxy for exponential backoff. Key: proxy Id, Value: (failureCount, lastAttemptTime)
Creates a MonitorService with health-check and optional auto-restart.
member.param: Callback to enumerate current proxies.
Callback for UI log messages.
Callback to refresh UI after status changes.
Optional callback to restart a failed proxy. If null, auto-restart is disabled.
Optional callback to persist proxy state changes (e.g., status Failed → disk).
Polling interval for process liveness checks.
Interval for TCP connectivity health checks. Defaults to 30s.
Max consecutive restart attempts before giving up. Default 5.
Base backoff duration for restart attempts. Default 30s.
Optional logger.
Optional override for process liveness check.

member.name: M:YLproxy.Core.MonitorService.ResetBackoff(System.Int32)
member.summary: Resets the restart backoff counter for a proxy (e.g., after manual restart by user).

member.name: P:YLproxy.Core.ProxyTester.TestUrl
member.summary: 代理连通性测试使用的目标 URL（可配置）。

member.name: P:YLproxy.Core.ProxyTester.TimeoutMs
member.summary: 单次测试超时时间（毫秒），默认 15000ms。

member.name: P:YLproxy.Core.ProxyTester.HttpMessageHandlerFactory
member.summary: Allows tests to inject a custom HttpMessageHandler. When set, the normal HttpClientHandler / proxy configuration is bypassed.

member.name: M:YLproxy.Core.ProxyTester.SetLogger(YLproxy.Infrastructure.ILogger)
member.summary: Allows tests or callers to replace the default logger.

member.name: M:YLproxy.Core.ProxyTester.TestAsync(System.String,System.Int32,System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: 代理连通性测试，内置重试 + 指数退避。
member.param: 代理服务器主机名或 IP
代理服务器端口
代理用户名（可空，取决于上游认证需求）
代理密码（可空，取决于上游认证需求）
取消令牌

member.name: M:YLproxy.Core.ProxyTester.TestAsync(System.String,System.Int32,System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: 代理连通性测试，可配置重试策略。
member.param: 代理服务器主机名或 IP
代理服务器端口
代理用户名（可空，取决于上游认证需求）
代理密码（可空，取决于上游认证需求）
最大重试次数（总共尝试 maxRetries + 1 次）。
基础重试延迟（毫秒），每次重试翻倍。
取消令牌

member.name: T:YLproxy.Core.ProxyTesterAdapter
member.summary: Adapter that implements IProxyTester by delegating to the static ProxyTester. Enables DI injection and testability without modifying the existing static class.
